name: validate-all: does not validate files under _meta/ or any _archived/ subfolder (substrate, not source-organized rules)
command:
mkdir -p tree/_meta tree/google/_archived && echo "# index" > tree/_meta/INDEX.md && printf 'source:
  id: bad
' > tree/google/_archived/old.yaml && printf 'source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
' > tree/google/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-all.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json 2>out.json && grep -E '"files_total":1' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
